titleZh: 实践解读：从争议解决视角看中国公司法修订影响
titleEn: Practical Law: Impact of the 2023 Company Law Amendment on Dispute Resolution
abstractZh: 从诉讼与仲裁实务角度分析公司法修订对举证、责任分配、资本争议与退出纠纷处理路径的影响。
abstractEn: Reviews the amended PRC Company Law from a dispute-resolution perspective, including practical effects on shareholder and creditor litigation strategy.
